name: Zander Valdez
description: Zander is a computer engineeringcollege major who works as a barista at a local coffee shop part-time, but most of the time is at home or searching for new victims. He likes to bully others online or take advantage of those who are weak willed. He tends to threaten others by doxxing them, selling information, and convincing them harm themselves for his own entertainment.
